description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure depicted in a dynamic running pose, with one arm bent forward and the other back, and one leg extended behind. The figure has a slender build and is dressed in fitted athletic wear, including a crop top, shorts, and gloves, all with a modern, sporty design. The character's hair is short, cut in a bob style with a side part, and the face is partially obscured by the pose. The body proportions and stylization suggest an animated or cartoon-like aesthetic, with smooth, simplified surfaces and minimal texturing. The figure's limbs are elongated and the musculature is subtly defined, emphasizing agility and movement. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the footwear appears to be form-fitting, suitable for athletic activity.
description: A stylized adult female in athletic wear, posed mid-run with dynamic limb positioning and short bobbed hair. The figure is slender, agile, and features smooth, simplified surfaces.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back, gloved hand, and the extended leg, with the hair and athletic outfit clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the running pose, bent arms, and the full profile of the athletic outfit and body posture.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the head, shoulders, and the forward-reaching arm, with the running stance visible from above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, with the forward arm and extended rear leg, and the athletic wear's fit.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear consisting of a crop top, fitted shorts, and gloves
attribute_posture: running with one arm forward and one leg extended back
attribute_hairstyle: short bob with a side part
